creator: zaphod@berentweb.com
text:
René Ladan wrote:
> g++ should be installed as /usr/bin/g++ (unless you have WITHOUT_GCC
> in /etc/make.conf)

Hi Rene,
lang/gcc (gcc46) is installed. /usr/bin has no gxx file. /usr/local/bin
has gcc46 and g++46. Since world is clang, gcc (42) does not exist.

I suppose a quick solution would be "ln -s"?
